matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0010111 4
1 0000000 a
2 0000000 a
3 0101110 4
4 0000111 3
5 0100110 3
6 0011100 3
7 1001001 3

34 43 0001000 1

56 65 0001101 3
67 76 0010101 3
70 07 0000110 2
